name: S-6 detector rejects provenance entries with class outside the allowed enum per the architecture vocabulary
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, severity: P1, provenance: [{source: g, class: made-up-class, section_id: "1.1", url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:abc}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rubric-provenance.sh" --tree tree 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'made-up-class' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
